items.title: Ülker Biskuvi A.Ş. - Change in Senior Management
items.content:
Özgür Kölükfakı has been appointed as a member of the Board of Directors, authorized representative, and CEO of Ülker Bisküvi, effective today.

The announcement details that Özgür Kölükfakı has been appointed as a member of the Board of Directors, authorized representative, and CEO of Ülker Bisküvi Sanayi A.Ş., effective from today. This represents a change in the senior management of the company. The company affirms that the disclosures are in accordance with the principles outlined in the Capital Markets Board's regulations on special circumstances and accurately reflect the information received.
